findings.title: 10/22 skills have thin content (< 40% section fill-rate)
findings.description: Hollow skills: [bp-architecture-design, bp-coding-best-practices, bp-component-design, bp-distributed-systems, bp-performance-optimization, self-refinement, spec-template, standards, +2 more]. Run `/skill-enrich` to auto-populate from external knowledge.
findings.suggestion: Run `/skill-enrich <name>` for each hollow skill, or batch enrich all.

findings.title: 2 high-severity entropy violation(s) from last scan
findings.description: EntropyGC found: FILE_TOO_LARGE: 1257 lines (limit: 600); FILE_TOO_LARGE: 1221 lines (limit: 600)
findings.suggestion: Run `/gc` and fix high-severity violations.

findings.title: 5 circular require() dependency pairs detected
findings.description: Circular dependencies: context-budget-manager.js↔context-budget-manager.js, experience-store.js↔experience-store.js, file-scanner.js↔file-scanner.js, orchestrator-stages.js↔orchestrator-stages.js, skill-enrichment.js↔web-search-helpers.js. These can cause partial module loading and subtle bugs.
findings.suggestion: Break cycles by extracting shared logic into a common module, or use lazy require() inside functions.

findings.title: 39 completely silent catch blocks
findings.description: Silent catch blocks (empty or comment-only) may hide important errors. While fire-and-forget patterns are intentional, excessive use can mask bugs.
findings.suggestion: Audit silent catch blocks. Ensure at minimum a console.warn for non-trivial operations.
